Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc. And Deutsche Bank National Trust Company, As Trustee For Wamu Mortgage Pass Through Certificates, Wamu 2005-Ar6s Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Plaintiff Keyhan Mohanna, Trustee Of The Keyhan Mohanna Revocable Trust Dated July 8, 2003s First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per Keyhan Mohanna (415-260-1873) is present.Appearing through CourtCall, Atty. Thomas Woods (916-319-4645) appearing for Defendant and moving party Select Portfolio.

Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc. And Deutsche Bank National Trust Company, As Trustee For Wamu Mortgage Pass Through Certificates, Wamu 2005-Ar6s' Demurrer To Plaintiff Keyhan Mohanna, Trustee Of The Keyhan Mohanna Revocable Trust Dated July 8, 2003s First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Defendants and their counsel ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Garrett L. Wong, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
